debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
i : Fin d
μ : Fin d → Measure ℝ
inst✝ : ∀ (i : Fin d), IsProbabilityMeasure (μ i)
f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : Integrable f (μ i)
⊢ Integrable (fun a => f (a i)) (Measure.pi μ)

failed_attempts: hf.comp_measurePreserving (measurePreserving_eval μ i)
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩

have h : MeasurePreserving (fun a ↦ a i) (Measure.pi μ) (μ i) :=
    ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩
  rwa [h.integrable_comp_iff hf.aemeasurable]
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving _ (MeasurePreserving.pi_eval μ i)
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨by fun_prop, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.pi_map_apply μ i⟩

rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i] at hf
  exact hf.comp_measurable (measurable_pi_apply i)

rw [← Measure.pi_map_eval μ i] at hf
  exact hf.comp_measurable (by fun_prop)
exact (MeasurePreserving.mk (measurable_pi_apply i) (Measure.map_eval_pi _ i)).integrable_comp hf

rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i] at hf
  rwa [integrable_map_iff (measurable_pi_apply i) hf.aemeasurable]

rw [← Measure.pi_map_eval μ i] at hf
  exact hf.comp_measurable (measurable_pi_apply i)
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨by fun_prop, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩
exact (MeasurePreserving.mk (measurable_pi_apply i) (Measure.map_eval_pi μ i)).integrable_comp hf
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩

haveI : Nonempty (Fin d) := ⟨i⟩
  exact hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩
exact (MeasurePreserving.mk (measurable_pi_apply i) (Measure.map_eval_pi μ i)).integrable_comp hf

rw [integrable_map_iff (measurable_pi_apply i).aemeasurable]
  rwa [Measure.map_eval_pi]
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving (fun a ↦ a i) ⟨by fun_prop, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩

rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i] at hf
  exact hf.comp_measurable (measurable_pi_apply i)
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩

rw [← integrable_map_measure (measurable_pi_apply i).aemeasurable]
  rwa [Measure.map_eval_pi μ i]
exact (MeasurePreserving.mk (measurable_pi_apply i) (Measure.pi_map_eval μ i)).integrable_comp hf
hf.comp_measurePreserving (measurePreserving_pi_eval μ i)

refine hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, ?_⟩
  ext s hs
  rw [Measure.map_apply (measurable_pi_apply i) hs]
  rw [show (fun a ↦ a i) ⁻¹' s = Set.pi Set.univ (Function.update (fun _ ↦ Set.univ) i s) by
    ext; simp [Function.update_apply]]
  rw [Measure.pi_pi _ (by intro j; by_cases h : j = i <;> simp [h, hs])]
  rw [Finset.prod_update_of_mem (Finset.mem_univ i)]
  simp [measure_univ]

haveI : Nonempty (Fin d) := ⟨i⟩
  rw [← Measure.pi_map_eval μ i] at hf
  exact hf.comp_measurable (measurable_pi_apply i)
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩

have : MeasurePreserving (fun a ↦ a i) (Measure.pi μ) (μ i) :=
    ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.map_eval i⟩
  exact this.integrable_comp hf
exact hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.map_eval_pi μ i⟩
exact (MeasurePreserving.eval_pi i).integrable_comp hf

rw [← Measure.pi_map_eval μ i] at hf
  exact hf.comp_aemeasurable (measurable_pi_apply i).aemeasurable
hf.comp_measurePreserving ⟨measurable_pi_apply i, Measure.map_pi_eval μ i⟩
